overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of Spider-Man walking through a wet downtown city street at night, transitioning from a main avenue to a narrow pedestrian alley. The scene features artificial street lighting, autumn foliage, reflective wet pavement, and occasional vehicles and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: main city avenue with retail storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet sidewalk past storefronts and street furniture

notable_agents.action: orange delivery truck parked along the curb

entered.detail: upscale retail store with black and white patterned facade and illuminated signage
tall metal street lamps casting reflections on the wet pavement
red metal newspaper vending machine on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks down a wet city avenue at night, passing an orange delivery truck and approaching the D'SALIGO storefront. The street is lined with lamp posts and autumn trees, with sparse pedestrian traffic and reflective pavement under artificial lighting.

events.description: Spider-Man stops at the street corner and turns right to face the crosswalk
yellow taxi cab drives past from right to left through the intersection
crosses the street and enters a narrower pedestrian alley with stone paving

agents.ego_description: waits at the corner, then crosses the street and enters the alleyway

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving through the intersection with roof light illuminated

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
illuminated traffic signal showing green light
trees with yellow-orange fall foliage lining the street corner
walk/don't walk signal box on the pole

segments.scene_description: At the intersection, Spider-Man stops and turns right, waiting as a yellow taxi passes by. He then crosses the street, moving from the open avenue into a narrower alleyway with different architecture and ground surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian alley with shops and cafes

events.description: bushes temporarily obscure the camera view as Spider-Man walks past a hedge planter

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alleyway past storefronts and outdoor seating areas

entered.detail: illuminated green cross sign indicating pharmacy
circular blue neon sign for coffee shop
wooden benches placed along the alley wall
green hedge planters in large concrete containers
black metal garbage bins lined against the wall
red brick building facades with large dark windows

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man continues through the narrow, enclosed alley with stone tile paving, passing a pharmacy with a green cross sign and a coffee shop with a neon sign. The alley features benches, trash cans, and hedge planters, with brick walls on either side creating a more intimate urban space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, brightly lit city avenue into the intimate confines of a narrow pedestrian alley. It begins with Spider-Man walking along a wet street lined with autumn trees and lamp posts, passing an orange delivery truck as he approaches the D'SALIGO storefront. As he reaches the intersection, the camera tracks him stopping to wait for a yellow taxi before he crosses the street, shifting the environment from the open road to a more enclosed space. The scene then narrows into a pedestrian alley with stone tile paving, moving past a pharmacy marked by a green cross and a neon-lit coffee shop. Finally, the camera follows him deeper into this urban corridor, flanked by brick walls, hedge planters, and street furniture under the glow of artificial lights.
